name: claude-mermaid
description: Mermaid diagram rendering with live-reload browser preview via the claude-mermaid MCP server — flowcharts, graphs, sequence/state/class diagrams exported to SVG/PNG/PDF.

install.notes: claude-mermaid is an MCP server. After install it must be registered with Claude Code (see post_install_hints).

post_install_hints: Register the MCP server with Claude Code (user scope, so it works in every project):
claude mcp add --scope user mermaid -- claude-mermaid
On Windows, if the .cmd shim fails to start, register the JS entrypoint directly with node instead:
claude mcp add --scope user mermaid -- node "$(npm root -g)/claude-mermaid/build/index.js"
Restart Claude Code afterward so the mermaid_preview and mermaid_save tools load.
Verify with: claude mcp list  (the 'mermaid' entry should show Connected).
Windows ONLY — claude-mermaid <= v1.6.3 crashes on browser-open ('spawn start ENOENT'). Apply the bundled patch (idempotent; re-run after every claude-mermaid update):
For a preview that survives Claude Code restarts, run a persistent server: claude-mermaid --serve  (gallery at http://localhost:3737/).
First render downloads a headless Chromium via Puppeteer — allow extra time on the initial diagram.
